description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND an MVPD Required game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an MVPD Required game tile that has not gone live yet in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>, <away_team_wins> Wins, <away_team_losses> Losses at <home_team>, <home_team_wins> Wins, <home_team_losses> Losses, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Not Entitled, MVPD Required, Pitching for the <away_team> <away_starting_pitcher>, <away_pitcher_wins> Wins, <away_pitcher_losses> Losses, <away_pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average, Pitching for the <home_team> <home_starting_pitcher>, <home_pitcher_wins> Wins, <home_pitcher_losses> Losses, <home_pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."
